next_steps: Test for Hantavirus (serology and RT-PCR) given the travel history to the Pampas/rural Chascomús region
Obtain arterial blood gas analysis and monitor for worsening cardiopulmonary failure
Consider early initiation of extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO) evaluation for severe Hantavirus-related hypoxemia
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) to rule out invasive fungal infection and infectious pathogens
Discontinue or de-escalate diuretics unless clear evidence of fluid overload exists, as capillary leak syndrome is characteristic of Hantavirus
Perform an autoimmune panel (ANCA, anti-GBM, ANA) to evaluate for vasculitis
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics while awaiting culture results
